creator: ddg01nb@duck.com
text:
Version 2.38.4 of www/webkit2-gtk3 and www/webkit2-gtk4 are available with many security fixes. The current ports version 2.34 has been more than 1 year old and have many known security issues remain unfixed. Shall we update webkit2-gtk3/4 to a newer version to reduce security risk?

Thanks, 
LKG.
